title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Don Bosco Tech - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Don Bosco Tech - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Don Bosco Tech family as a Curriculum Developer in Mumbai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Don Bosco Tech:
Don Bosco Tech is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Don Bosco Tech!
